verdict.answer_first: B states the core plan immediately: "turning it into a Progressive Web App (PWA) built around a service worker"; A starts with framing: "I'll give you the plan that covers the common case".
verdict.decisiveness: B commits to the key fork up front: "read-only or read-write offline?"; A surveys more plugin and layer options before the decision point.
verdict.actionability: B is easier to act on right now because it gives the fastest decision tree, rough scope, required building blocks, and verification steps without extra detail.
